---
title: "General Sir Richard Wilbraham"
---

## General Sir Richard Wilbraham

**Dates:** (1811-1900)

### Description

Governor of the Royal Hospital, Netley

### Biography

He married (1846) Eliza Frances Egerton and had one daughter, Katherine (Wilbraham) Baker-Wilbraham.  He was confirmed as an adult after instruction by Keble, and may have inspired the episode in <i>The Young Stepmother</i>.  His papers are in Cheshire Record Office.

### Letters

- Letter from Oct 24th [1875][[footnote:1]]
- Letter from Aug 17th [1864]
- Letter from [? November 1854]
- Letter from June 9, 1854
- Letter from Friday [3 March 1854]

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
